CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2005 Continued To Sep-02-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Michael Brooks Carroll, Esq. for Plaintiff: Josie Tavisora.
Plaintiff's witness: Lily Tavisora was sworn and direct examined.
Appearance by After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Perry Jackson and David Torres Ind & Dba Torres Handyman as follows:
Restitution $23,500.00
Interest $3,979.07
Compensatory Damages $21,500.00
Additional Damages $10,000.00 pursuant to CCP 1029.8; $500 pursuant to B&P 7160; $5,000.00 pursuant to CC. 1780(b)
Attorney's Fees $18,000.00
Costs $431.97, for a total of $82,911.04
Judgment signed in open court.
